# Backend Platform Engineer — Job Description

## What you will do
Backend Platform role requires Kafka, PostgreSQL, and incident response ownership. You will own the event pipeline (Kafka), the primary data store (PostgreSQL with logical replication), and rotate as on-call lead for platform incidents.

## Must have
- 5+ years backend experience.
- Production Kafka and PostgreSQL.
- Incident response (you have led at least one severity-1).

## Nice to have
- Rust or Go for performance-sensitive paths.
- pgvector / vector search.
